rulings.Case Title: ROCHELLE VAUGHN et al VS. WALTER WORSHAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Purported Service Of Process Of Summons And First Amended Complaint On Deft;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 11, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANT WALTER WORSHAM's Motion To Quash Purported Service Of Process Of Summons And First Amended Complaint On Defendant: GRANTED. Defendant has not generally appeared in this case and cannot be served through counsel without specific authorization. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: PLACE OF FRANK'S VS. FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 11, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS FRANK MYERS and CLAIRE FROEMME's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: continued to September 9, 2014. Place of Frank's LLC shall have until August 26, 2014 to file opposition; defendants shall have until September 2, 2014 to file a reply. = (501/lks)

rulings.Case Title: PLACE OF FRANK'S VS. FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Disqualifying Jonathan Fried From Representing Place Of Frank'S Llc In Any Capacity And Establishing That Frank Meyers Is The Sole Managing Member Of Same
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 11, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANT FRANK MYERS' Motion For Order Disqualifying Jonathan Fried From Representing Place Of Frank'S Llc In Any Capacity And Establishing That Frank Meyers Is The Sole Managing Member Of Same: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. No opposition filed. Jonathan Fried is disqualified from representation of Place of Frank's LLC in this action. Request to disqualify Jonathan Fried fromm serving as a manager/exclusive manager and declaring Frank Myers the sole and exclusive manager is DENIED. No authority is cited in support of this request. Request to replace Jonathan Fried by Robert Sprague is DENIED. Robert Sprague is the attorney of record for the only other member of the Place of Frank's LLC. Place of Frank's LLC shall have 30 days to hire independent counsel either by mutual agreement of Fried and Myers; or, if agreement is not reached by August 8, 2014, Fried and Myers may submit via declaration no later than August 12, 2014 the names of one counsel each who agree to represent Place of Frank's LLC. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: TATYANA VILDERMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 11, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: Continued to August 14, 2014. rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MAYFIELD et al VS. BALDWIN FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants; Request For Monetary Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 11, 2014, line PLAINTIFFs ANDREA MAYFIELD, SELWYN GAUSE, CEDRICK MAYFIELD, LARRY BROWN, ALICIA ROGERS, JANA HUISKEN, CHRISTOPHER ASHE, DESIREE HARRIS, KURT EDWARDS, LUTRECE DAVIS, ALLENA KEELE, IRMATINE BOLDS, DENNIS WOLFE, BRANDON JEREZ and PAUL GALINDO's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants; Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Motion is GRANTED as to Ashok Patel and Jonathan Fried. Patel and Fried shall appear for deposition no later than July 31, 2014 on a date set by Plaintiff. Motion is GRANTED as to Frank Myers. Myers shall appear for a remote deposition on July 12, 2014. Sanctions granted in the amount of $750 as to each defendant. = (501/LKS)
